context: Personal portfolio & tech blog of Berkay Yalçın, a Turkish .NET full-stack developer. Audience: recruiters and fellow developers. Tone: professional but warm, first person. UI copy should be concise; headings in title case where natural in English. Keep tech terms (Next.js, .NET, Supabase, CQRS, npm) untranslated. Company names, university names and product names (trkit, locakit) must stay as-is.
